name: Courtside Pickleball & Tennis Club
description: Courtside Pickleball & Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Dover, DE. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming.

name: Delaware Technical Community College - Charles L. Terry Jr. Campus - Dover
description: Delaware Technical Community College - Charles L. Terry Jr. Campus - Dover is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dover, DE. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Fly High Cheer and Tumble
description: Come play pickleball at Fly High Cheer and Tumble in Camden, DE! There is 1 indoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Kent County Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Kent County Recreation Center in Dover, DE! There are 9 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, and water.
open_play_schedule: Schedule changes weekly check Kent county recreation center on Facebook for up to date schedules
fees: Fee required — purchase a pass to play

name: Wild Quail Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Wild Quail Golf & Country Club in United States, DE! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Wyoming Town Hall
description: Wyoming Town Hall is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wyoming, DE. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.
open_play_schedule:
This is a multi-purpose court that runs a week of pickle then a week of basketball transitioning of Wednesdays.

See the Wyoming Town Hall Facebook page for the most recent schedule.
